overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a dystopian cyberpunk city street at night, featuring heavy orange atmospheric haze, neon signage, holographic advertisements, and rows of vending machines. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from an elevated walkway down to street level and through a foggy urban corridor lined with red paper lanterns.

events.description: turns left and begins descending from rooftop platform toward stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete walkway and turning left toward descending stairs

entered.detail: glowing green-yellow holographic display cube showing animated advertisement
low concrete wall barrier at edge of rooftop
tall metal antenna and communication poles against orange sky

metal safety railing along walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy rooftop walkway with a large glowing holographic advertisement cube visible ahead. The camera turns left and approaches a descending concrete staircase, with metal railings lining the path and antenna structures silhouetted against the hazy orange night sky.

events.description: continues descending ramp, approaching street level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete ramp toward street level, following the path downward

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the ramp, moving in same direction as camera

entered.detail: sloped concrete ramp with textured surface for descent
tall metal security fence running along left side of ramp
traffic signal showing red light at bottom of ramp
tall street lamp poles with glowing lights

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete ramp between tall buildings, leaving the rooftop behind. A metal security fence runs along the left side while pedestrians walk ahead. A red traffic light is visible at the bottom of the descent, marking the transition to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with vending machines and red paper lanterns

events.description: reaches street level from descending ramp, entering narrow commercial corridor
passes row of illuminated purple vending machines on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow street lined with vending machines, passing pedestrians and a burning barrel

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench near burning barrel
walking toward camera on the sidewalk

row of purple illuminated vending machines with advertisements
traditional red Asian-style paper lanterns hanging from building
doorway entrance to building with glowing interior

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto street level, the scene reveals a narrow commercial corridor lined with purple vending machines and glowing red paper lanterns. A burning trash barrel provides warm light on the left where a pedestrian sits, while another walks toward the camera. The atmosphere is thick with orange haze and neon reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with dense red vending machines and signage

events.description: passes large vertical billboard mounted on building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing down street past rows of red vending machines and neon signs

entered.detail: cluster of bright red vending machines with illuminated displays
tall vertical digital billboard showing advertisements on building
pink neon sign reading 'Watson Whore' with additional text below

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the narrow street, now passing red vending machines on the left. A large vertical billboard towers ahead, and a distinctive pink neon sign reading 'Watson Whore' becomes visible on the right. The metal fence continues along the left side as the street stretches into the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: approaches intersection with visible crosswalk stripes and open street
vehicle with headlights on approaches from the left side of intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching crosswalk at intersection, preparing to cross the street

notable_agents.action: approaching intersection with headlights on, moving slowly through fog

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on street
dark vehicle with bright headlights approaching through the haze
open street intersection with multiple directions visible

segments.scene_description: The street opens into a wider intersection with visible crosswalk stripes. The camera approaches the crossing as a vehicle with bright headlights emerges from the left through the thick orange fog. Tall buildings frame the intersection, and the dense urban environment continues into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated rooftop walkway down into a dense, neon-lit urban corridor and finally toward a wide city intersection. It begins on a foggy rooftop beside a glowing holographic cube, turning left to descend a concrete staircase framed by metal railings and antenna silhouettes against a hazy orange sky. As the camera moves down a concrete ramp between towering buildings, it passes a security fence and pedestrians before reaching a red traffic light that marks the transition to street level. The scene then shifts into a narrow commercial alleyway filled with purple vending machines, glowing red paper lanterns, and the warm light of a burning trash barrel, eventually passing a pink neon sign and red vending machines. Finally, the street opens into a wider intersection with crosswalk stripes as a vehicle with bright headlights emerges through the thick orange fog.
